observation.summary: repo-wide docs coverage can pass while the coverage manifest itself does not expose a complete evidence loop

hypothesis.summary: the repo-wide coverage manifest should publish its observe/hypothesis/execute/evaluate/retrospective chain as machine-readable CI evidence

execution.summary: require repo-wide knowledge coverage manifests to carry a complete loop and render that loop into generated reader output

evaluation.summary: coverage check must pass while reporting generated/direct/manual counts and embedding the complete evidence loop

retrospective.summary: coverage gates now describe their own loop in public CI artifacts, reducing review-time interpretation variance

evidence.proves: repo-wide docs are generated, direct-SSOT backed, or registered as manual debt and the coverage manifest exposes a complete evidence loop
public CI uploads repo-wide executable knowledge coverage evidence
